Text.Page: Hey! Interested in a little wager? You're looking at the fastest runner in all of Val Aureum.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"I find that...doubtful."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

Hah! I knew you'd say that. All right then, how about a contest? First one to reach Loqa at the West Watchpost, by way of Sandwalker Refuge, wins.

What do you say?

Pfft. Raquib's not fast, he's just fast for a berserker.

Rub his nose in it, but don't go overboard with the humiliation. He's still one of the best soldiers we've got.
All right, all right—get it over with.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"No hard feelings, Raquib."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

Yeah? You're all right, .

Next time you're in Tulufan, look me up. The drinks are on me.
